info.name: Losant Data and Data Tables API

description.content:
Aggregate, query, and stream time-series device data, and read/write rows in Data Tables for relational data alongside IoT telemetry. Derived from the Losant Platform API (Bravado/Swagger 2) at https://api.losant.com/.

Contact Support:
 Name: Losant Support
 Email: hello@losant.com
